components.name: BlogConstructorProvider
components.description: Root context provider for the blog-constructor. Composes all internal contexts (theme, locale, router, mobile, device, analytics, settings) into a single provider tree that must wrap any BlogPage or BlogPostPage usage.

props.name: isMobile
props.description: Whether the current device is mobile. Propagated via MobileContext.

props.name: locale
props.description: Locale configuration propagated via LocaleContext.

props.name: router
props.description: Router adapter propagated via RouterContext.

props.name: theme
props.description: Active UI theme ('light' | 'dark' | 'system' | 'light-hc' | 'dark-hc'). Propagated via ThemeValueContext and page-constructor ThemeContext.

props.name: device
props.description: Device information propagated via DeviceContext.

props.name: analytics
props.description: Analytics configuration propagated via page-constructor AnalyticsContext.

props.name: settings
props.description: Blog-constructor settings propagated via SettingsContext.

props.name: children
props.description: Child components to render inside the provider tree.

components.name: BlogPostPage
components.description: Full blog post page container. Renders a page-constructor PageConstructor with the post content, sets up LikesContext and PostPageContext, and includes an optional PromptSignIn overlay for unauthenticated like actions.

props.name: content
props.description: Page-constructor content model that defines the blocks to render.

props.name: post
props.description: Blog post data object exposed via PostPageContext.

props.name: suggestedPosts
props.description: Array of suggested posts exposed via PostPageContext for related-posts blocks.

props.name: metaData
props.description: If provided, renders a MetaWrapper with the given meta properties.

props.name: likes
props.type: { hasUserLike?: boolean; likesCount?: number; toggleLike?: ToggleLikeCallbackType }
props.description: Like state and toggle callback. When provided, enables like functionality via LikesContext.

props.name: settings
props.description: Props forwarded to the inner PageConstructorProvider.

props.name: navigation
props.description: Navigation configuration forwarded to PageConstructor.

props.name: microdata
props.description: Microdata configuration forwarded to PageConstructor.

props.name: custom
props.description: Custom block/header components merged with defaults via useExtendedComponentMap.

props.name: shareOptions
props.description: Share options exposed via PostPageContext for sharing blocks.

props.name: isSignedInUser
props.description: Whether the current user is authenticated. Propagated via LikesContext.

props.name: onClickSignIn
props.description: Sign-in click handler. Required to enable the PromptSignIn overlay when an unauthenticated user attempts to like a post.

props.name: breadcrumbs
props.description: Breadcrumbs configuration exposed via PostPageContext.

components.name: BlogPage
components.description: Full blog feed page container. Renders a page-constructor PageConstructor with feed content, sets up LikesContext and FeedContext with posts/tags/services/getPosts, and includes an optional PromptSignIn overlay.

props.name: content
props.description: Page-constructor content model that defines the blocks to render.

props.name: posts
props.description: Posts data object with posts array, optional pinnedPost, and total count. Exposed via FeedContext.

props.name: tags
props.description: Available tag filters exposed via FeedContext.

props.name: getPosts
props.description: Callback to fetch posts when filters or pagination change. Exposed via FeedContext.

props.name: services
props.description: Available service filters exposed via FeedContext.

props.name: navigation
props.description: Navigation configuration forwarded to PageConstructor.

props.name: hasLikes
props.description: Whether likes functionality is enabled. Propagated via LikesContext.

props.name: toggleLike
props.description: Like toggle callback propagated via LikesContext.

props.name: metaData
props.description: If provided, renders a MetaWrapper with the given meta properties.

props.name: settings
props.description: Props forwarded to the inner PageConstructorProvider.

props.name: custom
props.description: Custom block/header components merged with defaults via useExtendedComponentMap.

props.name: pageCountForShowSupportButtons
props.description: Minimum page count to show prev/next navigation buttons in the paginator. Exposed via FeedContext.

props.name: isSignedInUser
props.description: Whether the current user is authenticated. Propagated via LikesContext.

props.name: onClickSignIn
props.description: Sign-in click handler. Required to enable the PromptSignIn overlay when an unauthenticated user attempts to like a post.

components.name: FeedHeader
components.description: Blog feed header component. Renders a full-width header with optional background image/color and a Controls bar containing a search field, tag/service filter selects, and a saved-only toggle.

props.name: handleLoadData
props.description: Callback invoked when filters or search change to fetch new posts.

props.name: queryParams
props.description: Current URL query parameters used to initialize filter state.

props.name: tags
props.description: Tag filter options rendered in the tag select dropdown.

props.name: services
props.description: Service filter options rendered in the services select dropdown. The select is hidden when this array is empty.

props.name: title
props.description: Heading text displayed at the top of the controls bar.

props.name: background
props.description: Optional themed background image or color for the header.

props.name: theme
props.description: Theme used to resolve the themed background value.

props.name: offset
props.description: Grid offset applied to the content container.

props.name: verticalOffset
props.description: Vertical padding size applied to the content container.

props.name: className
props.description: Additional CSS class name for the root header element.

hooks.name: useOpenCloseTimer
hooks.description: Timer hook that computes an open/closed boolean state based on an open timestamp and a duration. Returns {open: true} while Date.now() - openTimestamp < openDuration, then automatically flips to {open: false} via a scheduled timeout.

parameters.name: openTimestamp
parameters.description: UNIX timestamp in milliseconds marking when the open state began.

parameters.name: openDuration
parameters.description: Duration in milliseconds the open state should last.
